mapper.select: select * from biz_instrument_open_rule where deleted = 0 order by instrument_id asc, week_day asc, start_time asc
select * from biz_instrument_open_rule where instrument_id = #{instrumentId} and deleted = 0 order by week_day asc, start_time asc
select * from biz_instrument_open_rule where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update biz_instrument_open_rule set instrument_id = #{instrumentId}, week_day = #{weekDay}, week_days = #{weekDays}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, max_reserve_minutes = #{maxReserveMinutes}, step_minutes = #{stepMinutes}, effective_start_date = #{effectiveStartDate}, effective_end_date = #{effectiveEndDate}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
update biz_instrument_open_rule set deleted = 1, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
